chapter_title.ar: باب صِفَةِ الذَّبْحِ وَ النَّحْرِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 3 – Characteristics of the slaughter and the sacrifice

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/8)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/8)
text: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا الْحَسَنِ ( عليه السلام ) عَنْ ذَبْحِ الْبَقَرِ فِي الْمَنْحَرِ فَقَالَ لِلْبَقَرِ الذَّبْحُ وَ مَا نُحِرَ فَلَيْسَ بِذَكِيٍّ .

en.hubeali: Ali, from his father, from Safwan who said,

‘I asked Abu Al-Hassan<sup>asws</sup> about slaughter of the cow in the upper part of the chest. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘For the cow and what is slaughtered in the upper part of the chest, so it is not with a (valid) slaughter’.
en.sarwar: 2. Ali has narrated from his father from Safwan who has said the following: “I once asked abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about slaughtering of cows in the upper part of the chest. He (the Imam) said, ‘Cows are slaughtered by cutting the throat; and if it is Nahr (a cut in the upper part of the chest) in the case of cows, it is not lawfully slaughtered.’”
